final:
// // This module reads data from an external source instead of storing it
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire D,      // Data input
    input wire WE,     // Write enable
    output reg Q       // Data output
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (WE) begin
            Q = D;       // Store the value of D when WE is high
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module reads data from an external source instead of storing it
